name: Accesswire Press Release Distribution API
what_it_does: Accesswire press release distribution REST API for PR professionals and investor relations teams to distribute news releases to media, investors, and disclosure networks at competitive pricing with unlimited word count. Enables AI agents to manage press release submission and global distribution for corporate communications automation, handle SEC-compatible disclosure distribution for investor relations compliance automation, access EDGAR direct filing integration for regulatory disclosure automation, retrieve distribution confirmation and media pickup tracking for PR performance automation, manage newsroom website creation and management for branded media hub automation, handle multimedia press release with images and documents for rich content PR automation, access analyst and investor targeting for financial communications automation, retrieve SEO-optimized press release distribution for digital PR automation, manage social media amplification and sharing for press release reach automation, and integrate Accesswire with IR software, PR platforms, and CRM systems for end-to-end corporate communications automation.
use_cases: Distributing press releases from cost-conscious IR and PR agents
Filing EDGAR disclosures from regulatory compliance agents
Creating branded newsrooms from media hub management agents
Distributing unlimited-length releases from content-heavy PR agents
not_for: Premium wire network with top-tier financial media guaranteed placement (use Business Wire or PR Newswire)
International multi-language distribution at scale (use PR Newswire for global reach)
Social media publishing without PR component
best_when: A cost-conscious IR team, startup, or growth company wanting AI agents to automate press release distribution, SEC disclosure, and branded newsroom management through Accesswire's value-positioned distribution platform.
avoid_when: DISTRIBUTION NETWORK TIER vs PREMIUM WIRES: Accesswire distribution network is broader and more cost-effective than Business Wire or PR Newswire but may have less guaranteed placement in premium financial outlets; automated IR programs requiring placement in WSJ, Bloomberg, or Reuters must verify Accesswire's specific outlet relationships; automated distribution without outlet verification may miss required disclosure channels for larger public companies. EDGAR FILING INTEGRATION SCOPE LIMITATIONS: Accesswire provides EDGAR-compatible distribution but full EDGAR filing may require separate filing agent; automated disclosure workflow must distinguish Accesswire press release distribution from SEC-compliant EDGAR filing; automated compliance workflow using only Accesswire distribution without separate EDGAR filing creates disclosure gap for required public company filings. NEWSROOM SEO INDEXING LATENCY FOR TIME-SENSITIVE CONTENT: Accesswire newsroom pages and press releases require search engine indexing time after publication; automated digital PR workflows expecting immediate SEO visibility for press releases must account for 24-48 hour Google indexing latency; automated press release performance reporting using organic search metrics immediately after distribution returns zero results.

auth.notes: Accesswire uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Clearwater, Florida HQ. Part of Issuer Direct Corporation (NYSE American: ISDR). Acquired by Issuer Direct in 2017. Products: Press release distribution, EDGAR filing, newsroom website, investor relations communications. Unlimited word count differentiation vs word-count-limited competitors. Global distribution in 100+ countries. EDGAR direct filing integration. Serves SMB to mid-market companies. Competes with PR Newswire, Business Wire, and GlobeNewswire primarily on price and unlimited word count.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-release pricing (significantly lower than PR Newswire/Business Wire); unlimited word count included; subscription plans for high-volume users
pricing.notes: Clearwater FL. Issuer Direct / ISDR. Per-release pricing. Unlimited word count. Budget-friendly vs premium wires.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; distribution submission throttled; no webhooks — status via polling or email confirmation

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — EMAIL AND POLLING FOR STATUS: Accesswire does not provide webhook callbacks for distribution completion; automated PR workflows must poll distribution status API or process email confirmation; automated time-sensitive disclosure workflows must implement polling loop with appropriate delay before marking distribution complete

API DOCUMENTATION SCOPE MAY NOT REFLECT ALL FEATURES: Accesswire API documentation is less comprehensive than premium wire services; some distribution features (embargo management, geographic targeting) may require manual configuration through portal rather than API; automated distribution workflows may need hybrid API plus portal configuration approach

ISSUER DIRECT PLATFORM vs ACCESSWIRE STANDALONE: Accesswire operates as part of Issuer Direct platform ecosystem; some advanced features (EDGAR filing, investor targeting) are accessed through Issuer Direct platform rather than Accesswire API; automated full IR workflow must integrate both Accesswire API and Issuer Direct platform capabilities

MEDIA PICKUP TRACKING LIMITED vs PREMIUM WIRES: Accesswire media pickup reporting is less granular than PR Newswire or Business Wire; automated PR measurement that requires outlet-level pickup confirmation must verify Accesswire reporting depth; automated PR ROI calculation using Accesswire pickup data may undercount placements compared to premium wire tracking

UNLIMITED WORD COUNT vs ATTACHMENT LIMITS: Accesswire differentiates on unlimited press release word count but multimedia attachment size limits apply; automated rich-media press release generation must verify image and document size compliance; automated submission with oversized attachments creates submission rejection without clear size limit documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: PR distribution. SEC Reg FD. API key. US. Press release and distribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: PR distribution. SEC Reg FD. API key. US. Press release data.
